utilities.note: electric + water + internet; similar to Belgrade

diningOut.note: ~$233 avg dining out; Novi Sad cafe culture

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. EXIT festival city; mild July spike.

evidence.claim: 1BR city centre avg £410 (~$515); single person cost ~$1,339/mo for nomads
evidence.quote: The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £410. The cost of living in Novi Sad is $1,339 per month for digital nomads

evidence.claim: Novi Sad 25-35% cheaper than Belgrade across housing, food, daily expenses
evidence.quote: Novi Sad is roughly 25% cheaper than Belgrade. Novi Sad is 25 to 35% cheaper across housing, food, and daily expenses compared to Belgrade

evidence.claim: groceries avg $216; dining out $233; transit pass ~£19
evidence.quote: Monthly groceries cost $216, while dining out averages $233. A monthly pass is typically priced at £19

evidence.claim: comfortable nomad living on €700–€900/mo; one of cheapest Serbian cities
evidence.quote: For those seeking a comfortable lifestyle, a nomad can live on €700–€900 per month comfortably
